sentences.arabic: الْمَنْسَفُ وَجْبَةٌ تَقْلِيدِيَّةٌ تَتَكَوَّنُ مِنَ اللَّحْمِ وَالْأُرْزِ وَاللَّبَنِ.
sentences.translation: Mansaf je tradicionalno jelo koje se sastoji od mesa, riže i jogurta.
sentences.translationEn: Mansaf is a traditional meal consisting of meat, rice, and yogurt.

sentences.arabic: حَضَّرَتْ أُمِّي هَذِهِ الْوَجْبَةَ اللَّذِيذَةَ لِلضُّيُوفِ أَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Moja majka je jučer pripremila ovo ukusno jelo za goste.
sentences.translationEn: My mother prepared this delicious meal for the guests yesterday.

sentences.arabic: نَضَعُ الْمُكَسَّرَاتِ الْمُحَمَّصَةَ فَوْقَ الْأُرْزِ لِإِضَافَةِ نَكْهَةٍ رَائِعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Stavljamo pečene orašaste plodove preko riže kako bismo dodali predivan ukus.
sentences.translationEn: We put toasted nuts on top of the rice to add a wonderful flavor.
